title: Industrial Dataset Ingestion
requirements: Autonomous scraping of industrial registries and vertical benchmarks.
Secure ingestion of regional GDP/Vertical growth data (World Bank/Regional APIs).
Rate-limiting and proxy-rotation for resilient scraping.

logic.discovery: Identify target URLs/APIs for GovTech, Fintech, and HealthTech trends.
logic.extraction: Parse semantic metadata using Scraper Agent v3 logic.
logic.storage: Archive raw data in factory/cfg/intake/raw/ and normalized data in factory/cfg/intake/processed/.

compliance.ethics: Respect robots.txt and public data TOS.
